  1. fasttween

Uses of Class
fasttween.Tween

  • Uses of Tween in fasttween

    Methods in fasttween that return Tween
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Tween
    Tween.duration(long durationMs)
    Sets the duration of this tween.
    Tween
    Tween.ease(EaseFunction ease)
    Sets the easing function for this tween.
    static Tween
    FastTween.from(float from, long durationMs)
    Creates a tween from the current value to 0.
    static Tween
    FastTween.fromTo(float from, float to, long durationMs)
    Creates a tween with explicit from/to values.
    Tween
    Tween.fromTo(float start, float end)
    Sets the start and end values for this tween.
    Tween
    Tween.onComplete(Runnable callback)
    Sets a callback to be invoked when the tween completes.
    Tween
    Tween.onUpdate(Consumer<Float> callback)
    Sets a callback to be invoked on each update.
    Tween
    Tween.reset()
    Resets this tween to its initial state without starting it.
    Tween
    Tween.start()
    Starts or restarts this tween from the beginning.
    Tween
    Tween.stop()
    Stops this tween immediately.
    static Tween
    FastTween.to(float from, float to, long durationMs)
    Creates a tween from a starting value to an ending value.
    static Tween
    FastTween.to(float to, long durationMs)
    Creates a tween from 0 to the specified value.
